name: agent-eval
tagline: Benchmarks a CodeGraph version's retrieval quality against plain grep/read on real repos via a background test harness.
verdict: Well-scoped internal dev-benchmarking skill: concrete AskUserQuestion flow, defined per-arm report format, no security concerns found. Missing negative-trigger guidance, explicit failure handling for missing prerequisites, and any version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance anywhere in the skill.
Lists prerequisites (tmux, claude CLI, node, git) but never says what to do if one is missing or audit.sh fails.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
